name: Conexeu Sciences Inc.
business: Conexeu Sciences Inc. is an early-stage medical technology company developing a patented temperature-responsive ECM scaffold device candidate, CXU, intended for regenerative biomaterial applications. The company targets multiple markets including wound care, aesthetics, dentistry, veterinary, and 3D bioprinting. It has not yet obtained regulatory clearance for any indication and is in preclinical development.

exposures.sentence: Conexeu is an early-stage medical technology company, focused on developing regenerative biomaterials that address significant needs in wound care, dentistry, and aesthetics.
GLP-1 therapies such as Ozempic and Wegovy , Mounjaro are accelerating demand for restorative aesthetics, in medical aesthetics with tens of millions of prescriptions expected globally by 2029.
